case_title: ANDERSON, MAUREEN VS STALEY, ROBERT H. ESQ. C/O EPSTEIN & ENGLERT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY ANDERSON, MAUREEN AS TO DEFENDANT STALEY, ROBERT H. ESQ.  C/O EPSTEIN & ENGLERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, MAUREEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STALEY, ROBERT H. ESQ.  C/O EPSTEIN & ENGLERT $1,589.90 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,674.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

TRIAL RESET TO NOV-12-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF OCT-21-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
